title: tarlmounia elliptica
side_effects: Tarlmounia elliptica can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea in individuals with sensitive stomachs due to its high concentration of alkaloids. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue caused by the imbalance of essential nutrients in the body. Furthermore, improper preparation and usage of Tarlmounia elliptica can also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues in individuals with pre-existing conditions. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
